title: Monitor observed comms change
body: Monitor observed collaboration-state change. active claims: 2 (Wooded Spreading Thicket: Persistent non-blocking comms coordinator: monitor active claims, shared comms log, fresh comms events/messages/conversa; Sparking Charring Ash: Land orphan markdown-only bundle (ADR-173 reviewer absorption + ADR-179 + verdict-not-menu rule + graph-stack plan updat) fresh surfaces: comms-events: d9b106f7-84ec-4ce6-8390-dd2a2a4d56d8.json, 90d95ff6-f30f-4ba9-a3f7-4aec5d4d488f.json, f91a7b32-8dce-4040-8e8c-db9a485e2f74.json | comms-messages: 198ee1a4-85d9-4313-af7a-bd3e2e49a9d3.json, 8a8811b0-c4bf-453e-b440-358b797fc057.json, 743cb9a7-0170-47a2-95e1-e0f1f85c60e6.json | conversations: pr-87-vercel-ignore-test-failures-prismatic-sidebar.json, pr-87-phases-3-6-vining-bending-root.json, ws3a-decision-thread-open.example.json | escalations: README.md Continuing 30-second non-blocking polling; no blocker.
